tolerance_notes.deflection: JS implementation should match analytical deflection within 0.1%
tolerance_notes.tip_deflection: Maximum deflection delta_max = P*L^3/(3*E*I) is the key check
tolerance_notes.curve_shape: Full deflection curve y(x) should match pointwise within 0.5%
tolerance_notes.units: All dimensions in mm, forces in N, EI in N*mm^2
